agent_confidence.description: Agent's self-assessed confidence (0–1) that this iteration helps.

agent_description.description: Agent's plain-English rationale for this iteration.

holdout_score.description: Held-out AUC for this iteration. Used to pick the champion at completion.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this autoresearch training run.

iteration_number.description: Zero-based index of this iteration within the run. Re-sending the same number updates that iteration (idempotent).

model_spec.description: model_class (must be allowlisted) and model_params tried this iteration.

parent_suggestion.description: UUID of the steering suggestion this iteration was spawned from, if any. Set it whenever the iteration acts on a pending suggestion — it links the iteration back to the suggestion for attribution and advances the suggestion to 'acted_on'.

recipe_snapshot.description: Compact recipe for this iteration: feature_sql (HogQL SELECT keyed on person_id) and transforms.

status.description:
'kept' if this iteration improved on the best score, 'discarded' otherwise, 'crashed' on failure.

* `kept` - kept
* `discarded` - discarded
* `crashed` - crashed
